description: Defines rollback, cooldown, no-repeat, and manual stop protections for TG test group sends. No daemon, no loop, no auto-repeat. All sends are one-shot and operator-gated.

rollback.instruction_placeholder: ROLLBACK: To rollback a TG test send, identify the payload_hash of the sent message. The rollback procedure is: (1) Post a retraction message in the test group referencing the payload_hash, (2) Mark the send record as rolled_back in local state, (3) Document the reason for rollback. This is a manual operator action — no automated rollback.

no_repeat.description: Each unique position+delta+date combination may only be sent once.

cooldown.minimum_window_description: Same address+asset pair cannot be sent more than once per 24-hour cooldown window.

failed_send_handling.description: If a TG test send fails (network error, API error, etc.), do NOT auto-retry. Operator must review the failure.

manual_stop.description: Operator may set a manual stop condition at any time. This prevents ALL subsequent sends until explicitly cleared.

no_daemon_no_loop.description: No daemon process, no cron job, no background loop, no timer, no auto-repeat shall be started for TG sending. All sends are one-shot, operator-initiated, and manually gated. This policy is non-negotiable.
no_daemon_no_loop.enforcement: Any code that starts a daemon, loop, or timer for TG send is in violation of this policy and must be immediately stopped.
